meaning: Bachelor of Industrial Engineering 工业工程学士
examples: China is a BIE member state.
Only BIE member states have the right to apply for hosting a World Expo.
These distinctions make up the business context that turns the component into a UBL BIE.
Tom Bie, the editor and publisher of the magazine, was a flyfishing nut, too.
The rebels set about shelling Kuito and fierce fighting is reported in Bie and Huambo provinces.
